scenario.send: SUBSCRIBE sip:sbcdev4.com SIP/2.0 From: [field0]@[field1];tag=1 To: [field0]@[field1] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Contact: [$localContact] Max-Forwards: 70 Supported: 100rel,sdp-anat,eventlist Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Event: dialog Expires: 86400 Content-Length: 0
